name: Generate Encounter
description: Demonstrates the sequence of functions to generate a deterministic encounter for a given scene, triggered by the GM.

sequence.action: Requests scene data to prepare for encounter generation.
Returns scene data, including traits and party info.
sequence.payload: Scene Traits, Party Level, Party Size

sequence.action: Requests a new mechanical encounter from the Encounter Service.
sequence.payload: Scene Traits, Party Level, Party Size

sequence.action: Returns the calculated mechanical encounter data.
Submits the full encounter (mechanical data + GM narrative) to be saved.
Confirms the encounter was saved successfully.

sequence_diagram_mermaid:
```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    actor GM
    participant Browser as PCOMP-001 (Boundary)
    participant AppServer as PCOMP-002 (Controller)
    participant Database as PCOMP-003 (Entity)

    GM->>+Browser: Clicks 'Generate Encounter' on Scene
    Browser->>+AppServer: GET /timeline/{id} (invokes LI-009)
    AppServer->>+Database: SELECT * FROM assets WHERE id = ...
    Database-->>-AppServer: Returns Scene/Party data
    AppServer-->>-Browser: Returns Scene/Party data

    Browser->>+AppServer: POST /generate-encounter (invokes LI-015)
    AppServer-->>-Browser: Returns Mechanical Encounter Data

    Browser->>GM: Displays Mechanical Data, asks for Narrative
    GM->>+Browser: Submits Narrative
    Browser->>+AppServer: POST /ticks/{id}/scenes/{id}/encounter (invokes LI-016)
    AppServer->>+Database: INSERT INTO encounters ...
    Database-->>-AppServer: Returns {success: true}
    AppServer-->>-Browser: Returns {success: true}
    Browser->>GM: Shows success message
```
